items.title: Morrissey Attacks Johnny Marr In Lengthy Screed Over New Smiths Documentary
items.summary: In 2024, Morrissey complained that he was being erased from the Smiths' origin story, and now he's angry about it again. In a since-deleted Morrissey Central post titled "The Art Of Forgery," the singer said he was not invited to take part in the process of a forthcoming BBC Smiths documentary, and that it's critical of him while painting Johnny Marr, his longtime foe, as an "angel." The post Morrissey Attacks Johnny Marr In Lengthy Screed Over New Smiths Documentary appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Mannequin Pussy Cover Ovlov For Spotify
items.summary: The shoegazy indie rock crew hasn't released much since 2021's great Buds, though they shared some demos of those tracks last year. But today we get Mannequin Pussy covering Ovlov, which is awesome. The post Mannequin Pussy Cover Ovlov For Spotify appeared first on Stereogum.

items.title: Dean Blunt, Elias Rønnenfelt, & Joanne Robertson Share ancnt grz ’22-25 Feat. A$AP Rocky, Jeremih, & More
items.summary: In 2024, Dean Blunt and Joanne Robertson released the joint album Backstage Raver, and the track "repeat offenders" featured Iceage's Elias Rønnenfelt. It features A$AP Rocky, Jeremih, Vegyn, Wraith9, evilgiane, and the Last Artful, Dodgr. The post Dean Blunt, Elias Rønnenfelt, & Joanne Robertson Share <em>ancnt grz ’22-25</em> Feat.
